_comment: Race definitions for Realm of Shadow. Each race has stat modifiers and innate effects.

Human.description: Versatile and adaptable, humans excel in no single area but have no weaknesses.

Dwarf.description: Stout and hardy, dwarves are natural miners and warriors with keen underground senses.

Halfling.description: Small and nimble, halflings are surprisingly resilient and hard to hit.

Elf.description: Graceful and keen-minded, elves have a natural affinity for magic and sharp senses.

Gnome.description: Clever and curious, gnomes combine a knack for tinkering with innate magical talent.
